orchestrator_disposition.reason: The owner identified the request proxy as the cause of the stalled invocation, removed it from the loop, and explicitly instructed a retry. The exact stale Claude PID was terminated; no verdict had been returned.

comments: Identity: HEAD=1f62ce564f127e18f5e0f044dd9fd4605f3a610c on a clean detached worktree; base 35f160f03d6dedc6beb841a3033076dab2b6e07c verified as ancestor; range contains exactly code-fix 942c88e601ea2d27f0a1da52aa5408b763ee61f4 plus the identity-record commit; changes confined to scripts/bench_otp12pf_rigw.sh (selftest quiet section + q_quiet_gate) and record docs (.review/findings/otp12-pf1-rigw-harness.md, DEVLOG.md, REVIEW.md, docs/STATE.md).

scripts/bench_otp12pf_rigw.sh:53,2376-2418 — fixed Spotlight ceiling SPOTLIGHT_CPU_MAX=10.0 unchanged; immediate (preflight) mode still dies on the first over-ceiling load or Spotlight sample; runtime mode may wait for either high load or high Spotlight for at most Q_LOAD_RECOVERY_MAX_S=120s in exact Q_LOAD_RECOVERY_POLL_S=5s polls; success requires load_ok && spot_ok from the same sample; offenders, Time Machine, load parsing, and Spotlight parsing recheck on every sample; bound exhaustion and malformed samples fail closed. Runtime calls sit only at run_block entry/per-round/exit (lines 3394/3399/3415) and end_gate (3422), outside timed arms; roles, endpoint-local paths, workers, schedule, measured-arm timing, trace schema, analyzer math, thresholds, Time Machine settings, and mounts are untouched by the range.

Green gates on reviewed bytes: /bin/bash -n OK; SELFTEST=1 /bin/bash scripts/bench_otp12pf_rigw.sh exit 0 (SELFTEST OK); python3 scripts/otp12pf_rigw_analyze_test.py 23/23 OK; scripts/agent/check-docs.sh OK; git diff --check clean for worktree and 35f160f..1f62ce5. New Bash 3.2 guards verified present: exact poll cadence pinned in every mocked sleep, exact two-poll bound with 'after 10s runtime recovery', transient Spotlight (87.3→18.4→0.5), staggered load-then-Spotlight, next-poll Time Machine and offender emergence, immediate load and Spotlight rejection, and malformed load/Spotlight failing without a sleep.

Red mutation 1 (all G14 tests kept): replaced only q_quiet_gate with the byte-exact BASE G13 implementation; complete self-test failed at 'runtime q Spotlight gate did not wait through post-transfer indexing' (exit 1).

Red mutation 2: after byte-exact restoration (blob f3a6195e121eaae74eb715a798e5e2d1aef70edb), gated offender polling to run at t=0 and every 10 seconds while retaining 5-second sleeps; complete self-test failed at 'runtime q quiet gate did not surface a recovery-poll offender' (exit 1).

Red mutation 3: after byte-exact restoration, over-advanced elapsed recovery time after the first poll (first poll +5s, later polls +10s) while retaining the actual sleep "$Q_LOAD_RECOVERY_POLL_S" line; complete self-test failed at 'persistent q load did not stop at the exact recovery bound' (exit 1). No test was removed or weakened during any red mutation; every mutation diff was confined to the production q_quiet_gate.

Final state: exact reviewed bytes restored; syntax and complete self-test green (exit 0); scripts/bench_otp12pf_rigw.sh byte-identical to HEAD via cmp against git show (blob f3a6195e121eaae74eb715a798e5e2d1aef70edb, SHA-256 21f4b686fdcd5ddfb47e8478a8666e5d10d0f9e838db2bf2f7227d0da75852d8, matching the DEVLOG record); worktree clean at 1f62ce564f127e18f5e0f044dd9fd4605f3a610c.

Evidence: the two retained d7345f1 SESSION-VOIDs (16/128 arms, 96/768 clock samples, pair-3 boundary at Spotlight 58.7% and 87.3% after q-destination mixed-tree arms) are internally consistent with the per-round runtime gate and with G13's immediate runtime-Spotlight death; the record correctly treats harness-triggered indexing as a high-confidence operational classification, not proof of exclusive causality. No benchmark endpoint was contacted, no retained artifact/worktree/evidence deleted, no Time Machine or mount change, no branch/commit/push.
